osquery_mapping.sql: SELECT p.pid, p.name, p.path, p.cmdline, s.remote_address, s.remote_port, s.state FROM process_open_sockets s JOIN processes p ON s.pid = p.pid WHERE s.remote_address != '' AND s.remote_address != '127.0.0.1' AND s.remote_address != '::1' AND s.state = 'ESTABLISHED' LIMIT 100;

osquery_mapping.description: DNS resolution for Publish/Subscribe Protocols (T1071.005)
osquery_mapping.name: t1071_005_dns_cache
osquery_mapping.sql: SELECT pid, fd, socket, remote_address, remote_port FROM process_open_sockets WHERE remote_port = 53 LIMIT 50;

osquery_mapping.description: Detect process execution patterns for Software Deployment Tools (T1072)
osquery_mapping.name: t1072_proc_exec
osquery_mapping.sql: SELECT pid, parent, name, path, cmdline, cwd, uid, gid, on_disk FROM processes WHERE cmdline != '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery_mapping.description: Process creation events relevant to Software Deployment Tools (T1072)
osquery_mapping.name: t1072_proc_events
osquery_mapping.sql: SELECT pid, parent, path, cmdline, uid, time FROM process_events ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery_mapping.description: SSH key access for Software Deployment Tools (T1072)
osquery_mapping.name: t1072_ssh_keys
osquery_mapping.sql: SELECT uid, path, filename, size, mtime FROM file WHERE path LIKE '%/.ssh/%' LIMIT 50;

osquery_mapping.description: Outbound connections for Software Deployment Tools (T1072)
osquery_mapping.name: t1072_net_conn

osquery_mapping.name: t1678_file_mod
osquery_mapping.sql: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime, atime FROM file WHERE (path LIKE '/tmp/%' OR path LIKE '/dev/shm/%' OR path LIKE '/var/tmp/%') AND mtime > (strftime('%s','now') - 3600) LIMIT 100;

osquery_mapping.description: Suspicious process attributes for Selective Exclusion (T1679)
osquery_mapping.name: t1679_proc_hidden
osquery_mapping.sql: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery_mapping.description: Recently modified files in suspicious locations for Selective Exclusion (T1679)
osquery_mapping.name: t1679_file_mod
osquery_mapping.sql: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime, atime FROM file WHERE (path LIKE '/tmp/%' OR path LIKE '/dev/shm/%' OR path LIKE '/var/tmp/%') AND mtime > (strftime('%s','now') - 3600) LIMIT 100;

osquery_mapping.description: System enumeration queries for Local Storage Discovery (T1680)
osquery_mapping.name: t1680_sys_info
osquery_mapping.sql: SELECT hostname, cpu_type, physical_memory, hardware_vendor, hardware_model FROM system_info;

osquery_mapping.description: Network enumeration for Local Storage Discovery (T1680)
osquery_mapping.name: t1680_net_enum
osquery_mapping.sql: SELECT interface, address, mask, type FROM interface_addresses WHERE interface != 'lo';
